name: Flan-T5
training_approach: T5 pretrained model + instruction finetuning on 1,836 tasks with chain-of-thought data
lineage_path: McCulloch-Pitts neuron -> Perceptron -> MLP -> RNN -> LSTM -> Seq2Seq -> Transformer -> T5 -> Flan-T5
summary: Flan-T5 applied instruction finetuning to T5 across 1,836 tasks with chain-of-thought examples, dramatically improving zero-shot and few-shot performance. It proved that instruction tuning was a general technique that improved models across scales, and that including chain-of-thought reasoning data in finetuning improved performance on reasoning tasks. Flan-T5 became one of the most popular open-source instruction-following models.
